# David Oks

> Personal website of David Oks - economics, history, and technology.

## About

David Oks previously worked at a hedge fund in New York, ran [The Gravel Institute](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Gravel_Institute) nonprofit, did [foreign reporting](https://www.palladiummag.com/author/david-oks/) for Palladium Magazine while at Oxford, and ran a [presidential campaign](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mike_Gravel_2020_presidential_campaign) in high school.

Based in California. Interested in economics, history, and technology.

Contact: davideoks [at] gmail [dot] com

## Site Structure

- **/** - About page with bio
- **/books** - Reading list since spring 2023 (149+ books, favorites bolded)
- **/blog** - Essays and articles

## Blog Posts

### On the death of Jeff Rigsby (January 2025)
Memorial essay about Jeff Rigsby, an American expatriate who died in Kabul, Afghanistan. A reflection on mortality, friendship, and a life spent in service of understanding Afghanistan.

### On my time in Afghanistan (February 2023)
[Palladium Magazine](https://www.palladiummag.com/2023/02/23/the-west-lives-on-in-the-talibans-afghanistan/) - Reporting from Taliban-controlled Afghanistan.

### On antibiotics and gut dysfunction (December 2022)
[Palladium Magazine](https://www.palladiummag.com/2022/12/13/are-farm-antibiotics-destroying-our-health/) - Investigation into farm antibiotics and their effects on human health.

### On the long, slow death of global development (November 2022)
[American Affairs](https://americanaffairsjournal.org/2022/11/the-long-slow-death-of-global-development/) - Analysis of global development challenges and failures.

### On the history and problems of the modern diet (June 2022)
[Palladium Magazine](https://www.palladiummag.com/2022/06/04/the-modern-diet-is-a-biosecurity-threat/) - How the modern diet poses biosecurity risks.

### On my time in Ukraine (February 2022)
[Palladium Magazine](https://www.palladiummag.com/2022/02/18/waiting-for-the-russians-in-ukraine/) - Reporting from Ukraine before the Russian invasion.

## Selected Books (Favorites)

The reading list includes many notable works. Bolded favorites include:
- *The Brothers Karamazov* by Fyodor Dostoevsky
- *Stoner* by John Williams
- *Blood Meridian* by Cormac McCarthy
- *Democracy in America* by Alexis de Tocqueville
- *Trade Wars are Class Wars* by Matt Klein and Michael Pettis
- *Augustus* by John Williams
- *A Time of Gifts* by Patrick Leigh Fermor
- *The Transformation of the World* by Jurgen Osterhammel
- *Caesar: Life of a Colossus* by Adrian Goldsworthy

## Technical Details

- Static site hosted on GitHub Pages
- Custom Charter serif typography
- Dark mode support

- [Substack](https://davidoks.substack.com/) - Current writing
